properties.description: Unique identifier for each compliance risk assessment record.
properties.business_rules: Must be unique, Cannot be null
properties.business_description: A unique identifier combining userId, loId, and assessment timestamp to track individual compliance risk assessments over time.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for null values, Validate uniqueness across the table
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by userId, Filter by loId, Filter by assessmentDate

properties.description: Reference to the user from User_csod table.
properties.business_rules: Must reference valid userId in User_csod table, Cannot be null
properties.business_description: Links the compliance risk assessment to a specific user in the organization for tracking individual compliance risk profiles.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate foreign key relationship with User_csod, Check for null values
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific userId, Filter by userStatus, Filter by division

properties.description: Reference to the learning activity from Activity_csod table.
properties.business_rules: Must reference valid loID in Activity_csod table, Cannot be null
properties.business_description: Links the risk assessment to a specific compliance training activity, enabling activity-level risk analytics.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate foreign key relationship with Activity_csod, Ensure only compliance activities are included
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by activityType, Filter by isCompliance flag, Filter by activityName
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by loId, GROUP BY activityType

properties.description: Timestamp when the risk assessment was calculated.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be <= current timestamp, Should be updated daily
properties.business_description: Records when the compliance risk assessment was performed, critical for tracking risk trends over time and ensuring data freshness.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure not in future, Validate timestamp format, Check for missing daily assessments
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by latest assessment, Filter by specific date
properties.aggregation_suggestions: MAX for latest assessment, COUNT by date, GROUP BY date for trends

properties.description: Overall composite risk score combining impact and likelihood (0-100).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100, Calculated as sqrt(impactScore * likelihoodScore)
properties.business_description: A composite metric representing the overall compliance risk, calculated using a geometric mean of impact and likelihood scores to balance both dimensions equally.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Check calculation accuracy against impactScore and likelihoodScore, Identify outliers
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by riskCategory, Filter by score ranges (0-25 low, 25-50 moderate, 50-75 high, 75-100 critical)
properties.aggregation_suggestions: AVERAGE, MEDIAN, PERCENTILE(90), MAX, MIN, STDDEV

properties.description: Severity of consequences if compliance training is not completed (0-100).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100, Higher scores indicate greater organizational impact
properties.business_description: Measures the potential organizational impact of non-compliance, considering factors like regulatory requirements, safety implications, financial penalties, and reputational risk.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Ensure consistency with activityType and isCompliance flag, Check for zero values on compliance activities
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by high impact (>75), Filter by activityType, Filter by division
properties.aggregation_suggestions: AVERAGE by activityType, MAX by division, PERCENTILE(90)

properties.description: Probability that the compliance training will not be completed on time (0-100).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100, Based on historical completion patterns and current progress
properties.business_description: Predicts the probability of non-completion based on user behavior patterns, time remaining until due date, historical performance, and engagement metrics.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Verify correlation with daysUntilDue, Check logic for already completed trainings
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by high likelihood (>75), Filter by overdue status, Filter by user engagement patterns
properties.aggregation_suggestions: AVERAGE by userId, MEDIAN by division, MAX by activityType

properties.description: Categorical classification of risk level based on riskScore.
properties.business_description: Provides a business-friendly categorical risk classification for easier interpretation and escalation workflows, aligning with standard risk management frameworks.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against allowed values, Ensure consistency with riskScore thresholds, Check for null values
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific risk category, Filter by Critical and High for action items
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by riskCategory, PERCENTAGE distribution, GROUP BY riskCategory

properties.description: Number of days remaining until the training due date (negative if overdue).
properties.business_rules: Can be null if no due date, Negative values indicate overdue, Calculated as dueDate - assessmentDate
properties.business_description: Critical metric for prioritizing compliance risk mitigation, with negative values indicating immediate compliance failures requiring urgent action.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate calculation against dueDate, Flag extreme values (>365 or <-365), Check for null handling
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by overdue (daysUntilDue < 0), Filter by approaching due date (0-7 days), Filter by urgency ranges
properties.aggregation_suggestions: AVERAGE, MIN for most urgent, COUNT by urgency buckets

properties.description: Number of days elapsed since the training was assigned.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if not assigned, Must be >= 0, Calculated as assessmentDate - assignedDate
properties.business_description: Tracks how long a training has been pending, useful for identifying procrastination patterns and user engagement issues.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative values, Validate calculation against assignedDate, Flag unusually high values
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by long-pending assignments (>90 days), Filter by recently assigned (<7 days)
properties.aggregation_suggestions: AVERAGE by userId, MEDIAN by activityType, MAX

properties.description: Progress towards completion expressed as a percentage (0-100).
properties.business_rules: Can be null if not started, Must be between 0 and 100, 100 indicates completion
properties.business_description: Indicates current progress on the training activity, enabling early identification of users who may not complete on time despite having started.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Ensure 100 when isCompleted is true, Check for logical consistency
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by partially complete (0-99), Filter by not started (0), Filter by high-progress low-completion
properties.aggregation_suggestions: AVERAGE by userId, MEDIAN by activityType

properties.description: Historical completion rate for this user across all compliance trainings (0-100).
properties.business_rules: Can be null for new users, Must be between 0 and 100, Based on trailing 12 months
properties.business_description: Provides user-level historical performance context, enabling personalized risk assessment based on individual track records and behavior patterns.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Ensure based on sufficient sample size (minimum 3 trainings), Check calculation methodology
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by low performers (<50%), Filter by high performers (>90%), Filter by new users (null)
properties.aggregation_suggestions: AVERAGE across users, PERCENTILE(10) for bottom performers, DISTRIBUTION

properties.description: User's historical average time to complete compliance trainings (in days).
properties.business_rules: Can be null for new users, Must be positive, Based on trailing 12 months
properties.business_description: Captures user-specific completion velocity, enabling more accurate likelihood predictions by understanding individual learning pace and engagement patterns.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure positive values, Validate against historical transcript data, Flag outliers (>180 days)
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by slow completers (>60 days), Filter by fast completers (<7 days)

properties.description: Flag indicating if manager notification is required.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Valid values: 'Yes', 'No', Triggered when riskScore > 75 or daysUntilDue < 7
properties.business_description: Automated escalation flag for management intervention, ensuring timely action on high-risk compliance issues before they become violations.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against allowed values, Ensure logic consistency with riskScore and daysUntilDue
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by escalation required (Yes), Filter by specific managers
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by Yes/No, PERCENTAGE requiring escalation

properties.description: Number of previous incomplete attempts on this training.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if first attempt, Must be >= 0
properties.business_description: Tracks repeated failed attempts, indicating potential content difficulty or user comprehension issues requiring intervention or additional support.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative values, Validate against Transcript_csod history
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by multiple attempts (>1), Filter by first-time attempts (0 or null)

properties.description: Number of days since user last logged into the LMS.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if never logged in, Must be >= 0, Calculated from User_csod.lastLoginDate
properties.business_description: Indicates user engagement level with the learning platform, with higher values suggesting disengagement and increased likelihood of non-completion.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative values, Flag extreme values (>90 days), Validate calculation
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by inactive users (>30 days), Filter by recently active (<7 days)

properties.description: Current compliance rate for the user's division (0-100).
properties.business_rules: Can be null if division not assigned, Must be between 0 and 100, Updated daily
properties.business_description: Provides organizational context by showing division-level performance, enabling peer comparison and identification of systemic compliance issues.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Ensure consistency with divisional aggregates
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by low-performing divisions (<70%), Filter by division
properties.aggregation_suggestions: AVERAGE across divisions, MIN, MAX, STDDEV

properties.description: Trend direction of risk over the last 7 days.
properties.business_rules: Can be null for first assessment, Valid values: 'Increasing', 'Decreasing', 'Stable'
properties.business_description: Identifies whether compliance risk is improving or deteriorating, enabling proactive intervention on worsening situations and recognition of improvement efforts.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate against allowed values, Ensure based on sufficient historical data (7 days)
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by Increasing trend, Filter by Decreasing trend to identify improvements
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by trend direction, PERCENTAGE distribution

properties.description: Recommended actions to reduce compliance risk.
properties.common_patterns: Manager Notification, Automated Reminder, Training Extension, Direct Contact
properties.business_rules: Can be null for low-risk cases, Multiple actions separated by semicolons
properties.business_description: System-generated recommendations for risk mitigation, providing actionable guidance for managers and compliance officers on intervention strategies.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate format (semicolon-separated if multiple), Ensure not null for Critical/High risk categories
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific action types, Filter by escalation level

properties.description: Each compliance risk assessment belongs to one employee
Each compliance risk assessment is for one learning activity
Compliance risk derived from user-activity transcript records

properties.displayName: Compliance Risk to Daily Aggregates Relationship
properties.description: Daily assessments are aggregated into daily organizational summaries

properties.displayName: Compliance Risk to Activity Aggregates Relationship
properties.description: User-activity assessments are aggregated by activity for content effectiveness analysis

relationships.name: division_aggregates_relationship
relationships.condition: ComplianceRisk_Silver.userId = User_csod.userId AND User_csod.division = ComplianceRisk_Division.division AND DATE(ComplianceRisk_Silver.assessmentDate) = ComplianceRisk_Division.assessmentDate

properties.displayName: Compliance Risk to Division Aggregates Relationship
properties.description: User assessments are aggregated by division via User_csod.division

properties.displayName: Compliance Risk to Monthly Aggregates Relationship
properties.description: Daily assessments are rolled up to monthly summaries for strategic reporting

properties.displayName: Compliance Risk to Enterprise Risk Relationship
properties.description: Compliance risk is combined with attrition risk for holistic employee risk profiles

TIME SERIES Silver layer table containing row-level compliance risk assessments tracked daily over time. Each user-activity assignment is assessed daily to monitor completion progression, risk evolution, and intervention triggers. Sample data includes 100 user-activity pairs tracked over 50 days (Oct 28 - Dec 16, 2024) for 5,000 total records.
properties.business_purpose: Provides granular time-series compliance risk scoring to enable: (1) completion progression tracking, (2) risk trajectory analysis, (3) early warning detection, (4) intervention effectiveness measurement, (5) predictive analytics on training outcomes, and (6) real-time monitoring of organizational compliance posture.
properties.data_lineage: Generated daily from User_csod, Activity_csod, and Transcript_csod tables using risk scoring algorithms (risk = sqrt(impact × likelihood)). Each unique user-activity assignment receives daily assessments tracking completion percentage, days until due, escalation flags, and trend indicators. Time series structure enables temporal analysis with window functions (LAG, LEAD, rolling averages).
properties.data_retention: Data retained for 2 years for historical trend analysis, completion pattern mining, and machine learning model training. Daily snapshots enable cohort analysis and longitudinal studies of training effectiveness.

observable_patterns: Risk scores decrease as completion progresses
Escalation flags trigger when risk > 75 or daysUntilDue < 7
Trends stabilize after 7 days of history

properties.key_relationships: userId -> User_csod.userId, loId -> Activity_csod.loId, References Transcript_csod for historical completion patterns
properties.queryPatterns: ["Filter by riskLevel (Low, Medium, High, Critical) for risk prioritization", "Filter by assessmentDate for time-series analysis", "Join with User_csod and Activity_csod to get user and activity details", "Filter by escalationFlag to find assignments requiring intervention", "Group by userId or loId for individual or activity-level analysis", "Calculate completion progression using completionPercentage", "Filter by daysUntilDue to identify urgent assignments", "Use window functions (LAG, LEAD) for trend analysis"]
properties.useCases: ["Compliance Risk Assessment: Track daily compliance risk scores for user-activity assignments", "Completion Tracking: Monitor completion progression and days until due", "Early Warning Detection: Identify assignments with escalating risk requiring intervention", "Risk Trajectory Analysis: Analyze risk evolution over time using temporal data", "Intervention Management: Find assignments requiring immediate attention", "Predictive Analytics: Use time-series data for completion prediction models", "Compliance Monitoring: Monitor organizational compliance posture in real-time", "Trend Analysis: Track completion patterns and risk trends over time"]
